message:
chore: update audit index (batches 409-412) and refresh raptorq wavefront artifact

Audit index updates:
- Batch 409 (CobaltGate): federation.rs — 4 bugs fixed (PartialEq,
  catch-up sequence ordering)
- Batch 410 (SageHawk): linalg.rs, systematic.rs — 2 bugs fixed
  (bounds check ordering, degree_min sentinel)
- Batch 411 (BlackMeadow): driver.rs, wheel.rs, sleep.rs — 2 bugs
  fixed + 1 SOUND (timer idle-gap synchronization)
- Batch 412 (BlackMeadow, CobaltGate): driver.rs follow-up,
  spork.rs — 2 bugs fixed (lock-contention timing, severity
  flattening)
- Additional yolo audit entries for obligation choreography files

Artifact: raptorq_track_f_wavefront_pipeline_v1.json refreshed
with latest benchmark percentile values (numeric-only variance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
